scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-8000}
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U postgres -d poker_trainer
scripts.lint: bun run lint:ts && bun run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: bun run format:ts && bun run format:api
scripts.format:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff format .
scripts.check: bun run check:ts && bun run check:api
scripts.check:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
